assertions.assertion: Implements ITokenRequestCustomizer interface with a Customize method
assertions.rationale: Creates a custom TenantTokenCustomizer class but does NOT implement the ITokenRequestCustomizer interface. It has a CustomizeAsync method with wrong signature (HttpContext instead of HttpRequestMessage).

assertions.assertion: The Customize method accepts HttpRequestMessage, TokenRequestParameters, and CancellationToken
assertions.rationale: The method accepts HttpContext and TokenRequestParameters (no CancellationToken, no HttpRequestMessage). Wrong signature entirely.

assertions.assertion: Uses the 'with' expression or equivalent to create modified TokenRequestParameters (e.g., setting Resource or Scope per tenant)
assertions.rationale: Creates a new TokenRequestParameters{} instance instead of using a 'with' expression. Also doesn't use the strongly-typed Resource.Parse()/Scope.Parse() methods.

assertions.assertion: Passes the customizer instance to AddClientCredentialsTokenHandler or AddUserAccessTokenHandler
assertions.rationale: Does not pass any customizer to the token handlers. Simply calls .AddUserAccessTokenHandler() without the customizer parameter.
